ddls:
CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "cust_id" TEXT /* Customer ID */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Customer birth date */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Customer age */,
  "address" TEXT /* Customer address */,
  "city" TEXT /* Customer city */,
  "state" TEXT /* Customer state */,
  "zip" TEXT /* Customer zip */,
  "email" TEXT /* Customer email */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Customer phone */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Created at timestamp */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Updated at timestamp */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "accounts" (
  "account_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each account */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer who owns the account */,
  "account_type" TEXT /* Type of account (e.g., checking, savings, investment) */,
  "account_status" TEXT /* Status of the account (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "account_number" TEXT /* Account number */,
  "account_name" TEXT /* Account name */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Created at timestamp */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Updated at timestamp */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("account_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_accounts_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "account_balances" (
  "balance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each account balance */,
  "account_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the account */,
  "balance_date" TEXT /* Date of the balance */,
  "balance_amount" REAL /* Amount of the balance */,
  "available_balance" REAL /* Available balance */,
  "pending_balance" REAL /* Pending balance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("balance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_account_balances_account_id FOREIGN KEY ("account_id") REFERENCES accounts ("account_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "account_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the account */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the transaction */,
  "transaction_type" TEXT /* Type of transaction (e.g., deposit, withdrawal) */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the transaction */,
  "description" TEXT /* Transaction description */,
  "category" TEXT /* Transaction category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_account_id FOREIGN KEY ("account_id") REFERENCES accounts ("account_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "investment_accounts" (
  "investment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each investment account */,
  "account_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the account */,
  "investment_type" TEXT /* Type of investment (e.g., stock, bond) */,
  "investment_amount" REAL /* Amount of the investment */,
  "investment_date" TEXT /* Investment date */,
  "maturity_date" TEXT /* Maturity date */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("investment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_investment_accounts_account_id FOREIGN KEY ("account_id") REFERENCES accounts ("account_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "investment_funds" (
  "fund_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each investment fund */,
  "investment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the investment account */,
  "fund_name" TEXT /* Name of the fund */,
  "fund_amount" REAL /* Amount of the fund */,
  "fund_percentage" REAL /* Fund percentage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fund_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_investment_funds_investment_id FOREIGN KEY ("investment_id") REFERENCES investment_accounts ("investment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "account_opened" (
  "opened_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each account opened */,
  "account_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the account */,
  "opened_date" TEXT /* Date the account was opened */,
  "opened_by" TEXT /* Opened by (e.g., customer, employee) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("opened_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_account_opened_account_id FOREIGN KEY ("account_id") REFERENCES accounts ("account_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_accounts" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer */,
  "account_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the account */,
  "customer_type" TEXT /* Type of customer (e.g., individual, business) */,
  "relationship_manager" TEXT /* Relationship manager */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id", "account_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "security_questions" (
  "question_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each security question */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer */,
  "question" TEXT /* Security question */,
  "answer" TEXT /* Answer to the security question */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("question_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_security_questions_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)
column_names: Reference to the customer who owns the account
Type of account (e.g., checking, savings, investment)
Status of the account (e.g., active, inactive)
Unique identifier for each account balance
Unique identifier for each investment account
Unique identifier for each investment fund
Unique identifier for each account opened
Unique identifier for each security question
